metadata.name: Obex
metadata.description: Obex PnL configuration: simplest star. Net Amount equals Maximum Debt Fees — no reimbursements, no subsidies.

calculationModules.name: Step 4: Sky Direct Exposure
calculationModules.notes: Maple position handled differently — see known issue BUG-1

parameters.accountingNotes: Net Amount = Maximum Debt Fees. No reimbursements and no subsidies apply. Maple syrupUSDC revenue is not offset against debt fees in the current implementation (see BUG-1).

knownIssues.description: The Obex reimbursement calculation uses an inverted formula (revenue - maxDebtFees) instead of MAX(0, Base Rate Cost - Actual Revenue) as specified. Additionally, it uses maxDebtFeesUsd as base cost instead of principal × rate.
